questions.question_text_full: A motorboat whose speed is 20 km/h in still water takes 30 minutes more to go 24 km upstream than to cover the same distance downstream. If the speed of the boat in still water is increased by 2 km/h, then how much time will it take to go 39 km downstream and 30 km upstream?
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: If 4sin 2 θ = 3(1+ cos θ), 0° < θ < 90°, then what is the value of (2tan θ + 4sin θ - sec θ)?
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: Find the greatest number 23a68b, which is divisible by 3 but NOT divisible by 9.
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.
